name: Kamala Communications Team
subject: Nasty?
body:
Check out this headline from the New York Times:

It didn’t take long after Kamala grilled Trump’s hand-picked Attorney
General for Trump himself to attack her.

It seems like anytime Donald Trump feels threatened by a strong woman, he
lashes out with this gross, weird attack. It’s the kind of sexism that
makes me want to run my head through a wall. But instead of doing that,
let’s do something productive. I know we’ve asked a lot lately -- but can
you step up and add
a donation to Kamala’s campaign
today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Another Amount

In 2016, we saw Trump use this exact weird, gendered attack -- “nasty” --
against Hillary Clinton after she put him on his heels in a debate. You’d
think, after three years, he could at least come up with something more
original.

But let’s be clear about what’s happening here. Trump is singling out Kamala for a
reason: he and his team have been watching our campaign closely, measuring
our momentum with each passing day. And they’re scared.

Kamala is one of the LAST people Trump wants to face on the debate stage
in 2020. I think you saw exactly why when she grilled Attorney General
Barr yesterday.

Being a former prosecutor sure does have its benefits. Kamala is one of
the most prepared, detail-oriented people I’ve ever met -- and she’s never
backed down from a tough fight. Not as District Attorney, not as
California’s Attorney General, not as a U.S. Senator, and not in her
historic campaign for president.

Don’t you want to see her show that skill in a debate with Donald Trump? I
sure do. But we can’t get there if we don’t win this primary. These
attacks from Trump and his team are only going to get worse as we get
further into this race and the field narrows. That’s why we’re calling on
you now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190502-barr?refcode=ema190502-trump-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1007&refcode2=4643_5755789_d_EMhs&akid=4643%2E5755789%2Ed_EMhs ]Help us show Trump the strength of our grassroots movement by adding
a donation to Kamala’s grassroots
campaign today.

Thanks. Talk soon,

— Lily

Lily Adams
Communications Director
Kamala 2020

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Jason Yates
subject: SURVEY: How Do You Pray For Our Nation?
body:
| | Peter, I recently ran across an article that gave the sobering reminder, “Government cannot fix us. Politics will never heal us.” The author discussed a Christian response to a divided America. We know that division does not honor God as Luke 11:17 reads, “Every kingdom divided against itself is headed for destruction, and a house divided against itself falls.” As the division in our nation continues to grow, it is up to us to stand firmly in faith and **_lift up our country in prayer_**. Yesterday, we celebrated the National Day of Prayer, a day of observance that exists to mobilize a unified prayer movement throughout our nation. So, I am curious to know how often you specifically pray for our country and its leaders? **How often do you pray for our nation?** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbVvarj58CBDs_taz6BXH3elaZUuzRFmtvuPqBHvh39ydfkLSeq3PlB3j0-cWbIyGRERl1y7IutAXNSWdsFmvBFbd36GzNyI6LlVj62in5Ow-FKa3TO-HX7VRkQx0q5HOo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190503srv01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbVvarj58CBDs_taz6BXH3elaZUuzRFmtvuPqBHvh39ydfkLSeq3PlB3j0-cWbIyGRERl1y7IutAXNSWdsFmvBFbd36GzNyI6LlVj62in5Ow6PJMrrs8yPja_bVhdcoeax3y53lg7CTzoy_lh_qPUki&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190503srv01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0Rh1dmBDNYWxs4Gmryp_voYbVvarj58CBDs_taz6BXH3elaZUuzRFmtvuPqBHvh39ydfkLSeq3PlB3j0-cWbIyGRERl1y7IutAXNSWdsFmvBFbd36GzNyI6LlVj62in5Ow2AELb6bw9AFa8GRssCdpKBeN-TOd1PBfbVXp3BdG0sC8wJB2NWkdrtVqmJRQ5CQk8lnmyVP88jI3Tjnx5mOAWxXlyR6I0gp9PBxpntQwjv0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190503srv01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates

subject: [breaking] the GOP is extending its voter suppression to New Hampshire >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter-- The GOP is officially taking its voter suppression tactics nationwide. The latest target: New Hampshire college students. Republicans are now insisting -- with no precedent -- that students from other states, who lawfully reside in New Hampshire, will need to jump through hoops like acquiring NH driver licenses to vote in the state. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter-- The GOP is officially taking its voter suppression tactics nationwide. The latest target: New Hampshire college students. Republicans are now insisting -- **_with no precedent_** \-- that students from other states, who lawfully reside in New Hampshire, will need to jump through hoops like acquiring NH driver licenses to vote in the state. And here's the thing: if a college student did vote without a driver's license, they could be punished with **_jail time!_** Democratic Sen. Jeanne Shaheen is calling this what it is: a voter suppression law. She's fighting for this issue to be recognized nationally and called out by Democratic presidential candidates: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d076c/72412298/441f56cb/610100c7/1353897698/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/newhampshire_votersupupression?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1") Why are Republicans trying to disenfranchise young voters? **Because those voters are overwhelmingly Democrats and New Hampshire is a key 2020 swing state! ** **[We're counting on your support--will you sign our petition to tell Republicans we won't tolerate their voter suppression techniques in ANY form? >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d076c/72412298/441f56cb/610100c6/1353897698/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/newhampshire_votersupupression?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+counting+on+your+supportwill+y&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1")** | | | [Sign on >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d076c/72412298/441f56cb/610100c9/1353897698/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/newhampshire_votersupupression?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+on+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1")
---
This is just the latest in a series of voter suppression attempts that the GOP has launched all across the country -- because Republicans know that's the only way they will re-elect Trump.
**[Help the Voter Protection Project to maintain fair election policy in New Hampshire and beyond>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d076c/72412298/441f56cb/610100c8/1353897698/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/newhampshire_votersupupression?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Help+the+Voter+Protection+Project+to+mai&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190503_NewHampshire_U1_X1")**
In solidarity,
The Voter Protection Project

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Did you know a majority of our donors are women?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
This campaign is about lifting up voices that haven't been heard for far too long, and radically changing the face of leadership.
| | |
---
Peter,
From the moment she launched her campaign for president, Kirsten committed to building something big and brave.
This campaign is about taking on fights others won't. It's about lifting up voices that haven't been heard in far too long--and radically changing the face of leadership.
Our supporters reflect that. **This week, Rachel Maddow highlighted the fact that the majority of our donors are women; we 're the only 2020 presidential campaign that can say that.** In a political system that has been dominated by men--even in terms of who gives to campaigns--that's a big deal.
Take a look at some of the other stats about this team:
* **Our average grassroots donation is just $21.** This campaign is powered by people.

* **Our oldest donor is 90, and our youngest donor is 18.** Our movement spans generations.

* **Educators** make up the highest number of donors by occupation.

* **58% of our first-quarter donors had never given to Kirsten 's campaigns before.** We're growing fast.

I'm so proud of what this team and community have built so far--and this is just the beginning. Our movement is strong, and it's growing every day. But we're counting on supporters like you to sustain us.
Can you make a gift to Kirsten's campaign to make sure she's on the Democratic debate stage where she can continue to share her brave vision for this country?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Jobs Surge in April, Unemployment Rate Falls to the Lowest Since 1969
body:
"The U.S. jobs machine kept humming along in April, adding a robust 263,000 new hires while the unemployment rate fell to 3.6%." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff47167ff4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Jobs Surge in April, Unemployment Rate Falls to the Lowest Since 1969**

“The U.S. jobs machine kept humming along in April, adding a robust 263,000 new hires while the unemployment rate fell to 3.6%, the lowest in a generation, according to a Labor Department report Friday,” Jeff Cox reports in CNBC. The American economy “easily beat Wall Street expectations of 190,000 and a 3.8% jobless rate.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c19a75ae9f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump hits a new high on his economic approval ratings in a new CNN Poll conducted by SSRS, reaching 56% of Americans saying he's doing a good job on the economy,” Grace Sparks reports for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30bd861f58&e=3ee4985eea). “At the same time, Trump's favorability rating has hit its highest point since the 100-day mark of his presidency.”
---
|
---
| “Doing her best to raise the level of civility in Washington, Nancy Pelosi called William Barr a liar on Thursday . . . The real reason for Mrs. Pelosi’s slander is what else Mr. Barr said the last time he was before Congress. He said that spying on a political campaign was a ‘big deal,’ that he thought the FBI did spy on the Trump campaign in 2016, and that he intends to find out what happened and why,” _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0430e430c2&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “What is perhaps most notable about this episode is that Robert Mueller — or, perhaps, as Barr hinted in his Wednesday testimony, people around him — were concerned about the media coverage and political discussion around his report. Particularly troubling was that it wasn’t damning enough of the president. This is not a prosecutorial concern, but a political one unworthy of people who were invested with incredible investigative power in the name of objectivity,” the _[National Review](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0da1594cb0&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “Bill Barr’s critics are demonstrating their lack of judgment and seriousness, not his.”
---
|
---
| “Only about 15 percent of America’s students have a reasonable understanding of American history. And the numbers look just as bleak in other core subjects,” Education Secretary Betsy DeVos writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f2f7375a6&e=3ee4985eea)_. “There are many who propose we spend even more on doing the same thing over and over again. Albert Einstein called this ‘insanity.’ . . . Students deserve something different. And actually doing something different demands courage to confront a powerful and pernicious establishment — one that opposes change in education.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d829c8e0d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dfb51cdbd8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6c0cb6c3dd)
---

---
Peter, this country wasn't built by bankers, CEOs, or hedge fund managers. This country was built by the American middle class.

But today, the middle class is under attack, and too many families are being left out. They are working longer hours for less pay.

**That 's why I'm calling for a $15 minimum wage -- so we can build an economy where everyone has a chance to get ahead.**

[And Peter, I'm asking you to stand with me on this, Sign your name to call for an increase of the national minimum wage to $15:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b43/1cd0ac28/311f4770/356bf6a0/3652378491/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Minimum-Wage?source=email-bsd-20190503minimumwage-b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190503minimumwage&utm_content=b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1") | | [**SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b43/1cd0ac28/311f4770/356bf6a0/3652378491/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Minimum-Wage?source=email-bsd-20190503minimumwage-b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190503minimumwage&utm_content=b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1")
---
The middle class isn't a _number_ \-- it's a set of values. Owning your own home. Sending your kids to college. Taking care of your geriatric parents.

The cost of all of these things is rising. And wages? Those aren't.

We need to fix that, Peter.

We need to restore the basic bargain for Americans so that if you work hard, you are able to share in the prosperity your work helped create.

To do this, we need to start with paying fair wages from the beginning.

[I'm asking you to speak up, with me, and call for a raise of the national minimum wage, as the first step of many to have the back of American workers. Sign your name:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b43/1cd0ac28/311f4770/356bf6a0/3652378491/VEsC/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Minimum-Wage?source=email-bsd-20190503minimumwage-b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190503minimumwage&utm_content=b1_PET_ACsendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1")

\-- _Joe_

Peter,
This morning, Stefanie wrote to you about the amazing array of voices participating in our campaign. In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[complete our May priorities survey so I can hear from everyone in this movement about what you'd like to see me focus on this month.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-may-strategy?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3085-su-nd")**

[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-may-strategy?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3085-su-nd")
This is what my notebook looks like when I leave a community meeting--this page in particular is from my recent Iowa trip. It's packed full of stories straight from hardworking Americans I meet on the road.
I love hearing the stories of everyone I meet, and I love hearing their solutions, too, because I've learned that if you sit a person down and ask them what problems they're facing and give them the time to really answer the question, they usually have a few ideas for how to fix them. It's not that they haven't tried to tackle them on their own; it's that they lack the resources to take action or some kind of barrier is in their way.
**I don't pretend to have the answers to everything****--****and I'm not afraid to say when I don't.** Building a stronger, more unified America takes all of us, and if I'm going to lead that change, I need to talk to as many people as I can.
I hope you'll be one of them.
**Can you take a minute to fill out our May priorities survey so I know what's on your mind? I hope to use your story to decide our campaign's priorities this month. Here's the best link:**
**[https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-may-strategy](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-may-strategy?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3085-su-nd")**
Thanks in advance--I look forward to reading what you write!

Kirsten

subject: This Tuesday
body:
This Tuesday is Primary Day. Hoosier Republicans across Indiana will be going to the ballot box and selecting our party's candidates for city and... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/this-tuesday?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_This Tuesday_** This Tuesday is Primary Day. Hoosier Republicans across Indiana will be going to the ballot box and selecting our party's candidates for city and town races across our state.

It's a mighty task, both as a voter and a candidate. As a voter, I encourage you to take the time to look into the candidates on your ballot and vote for the Republican who you think best represents the people-first, results-driven policies that are the hallmarks of our party statewide.

To our candidates who have put their name forward to serve Hoosiers and assume the huge responsibility of watching over tax dollars and providing great government service: Thank you for running, and best of luck on Tuesday.

I look forward not only to seeing your name on the ballot this November, but to welcoming you, our Republican nominees, to a special training seminar we have planned in June called [Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana's Cities and Towns](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f9d0f44946&e=1acd9bb3d6). We have a full day of candidate training planned, where you'll learn everything from determining your winning coalition to recruiting volunteers to raising money to new communication technology and more. It's going to be a great day, and I'd really encourage you to [sign up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf771081e0&e=1acd9bb3d6).

But most importantly of all, I'd like to take this opportunity to say thank you. Thank you for making up the BEST Republican Party in the nation. Now get out there and vote!

**PHOTO:** _**Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** was in Floyd County this week for their Lincoln Day Dinner. Here's a photo of **Chairman Hupfer** with **Floyd County Republican Party Chairman and County****Commissioner**** Shawn Carruthers** (who put on an excellent event), **New Albany mayoral candidate Mark Seabrook** , **State Rep. Ed Clere** and **State Rep. Karen Engleman**. _
---
|
---
| | | **GOVERNOR HOLCOMB'S WEEK THAT WAS**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Signing Bills & Helping Hoosiers_**
_Governor Holcomb Signs Balanced Budget, Workforce Bill & More_ Yesterday, Indiana's 51st governor celebrated his 51st birthday! And to celebrate his birthday week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** was hard at work for Hoosiers, signing several people-focused bills that passed the Indiana General Assembly.
* **Balanced Budget:** Indiana's new two-year budget is honestly-balanced, maintains responsible reserves and protects our AAA credit rating. It provides an historic $763 million in new money for K-12 education, including paying down a $150 million schools pension liability that will free up funds that can go into teacher paychecks.
* **Workforce Development** : Governor Holcomb is doubling down on Next Level Jobs, helping more Hoosiers skill-up either on the job or through certificate programs. The state is also making it easier for job creators to partner with local schools and prioritizing local solutions to career coaching.
* **Exempting Military Pensions from State Income Tax** : Our talented, patriotic veterans are some of the most experienced, focused and loyal workers anywhere, and Indiana is working to attract and retain them as part of Indiana's workforce.
* **Economic Development** : Indiana is modernizing economic development tools to increase competitiveness, economic diversity and flexibility.
* **School Safety:** This is one of Governor Holcomb's top priorities, and this new law provides access to more funding for safety equipment, facilitates partnerships with local law enforcement and requires threat assessments in our schools.

But**Governor Holcomb's** week didn't stop there. Yesterday, he announced that 17 communities will receive $24.9 million in state grants to support trail development as part of Next Level Trails! [Check here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5257976510&e=1acd9bb3d6) to see if your community was selected in this first round!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Remembering Senator Richard Lugar_**
_Reflecting on a Transformative Leader_ Last Sunday, Indiana and the world lost Richard Lugar: a mayor, senator, visionary, leader and Hoosier.

Public memorial services for Senator Lugar are still pending, and we'll update you here when more information is announced.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c69cf88168&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_The American Economy is Breaking Records!_**
_Thank you, President Trump!_ The latest national jobs report was released today, and it's BIG news for the U.S. economy! The national unemployment rate has fallen to 3.6%, which is the lowest rate in 50 years!

A total of 263,000 new American jobs were added in April, and the average American wage now stands at $27.77/hour! Read more about our record-setting economy [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2e5bdd479e&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thank you, President Donald Trump, for your leadership!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Lincoln Day Dinners:_**
_**Southern Indiana & Allen County**_ This was the week for Lincoln Day Dinners in Southern Indiana (plus Allen County)!

Over the last week, your local Republican Parties in Perry, Scott, Jackson, Spencer, Orange and Floyd counties hosted fantastic events. And they attracted some big Republican leaders, including**Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Senator Todd Young, Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** and **Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer**.

And Allen County? They packed the house for **Wyoming Congresswoman Liz Cheney** , as she talked about her experience as a national security expert and high-ranking member of Congress.

Check out the list below to see upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners near you!

[May 9:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d9e1c4a586&e=1acd9bb3d6) LaGrange County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb

[May 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=55ae19a197&e=1acd9bb3d6): Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner with Senator Mike Braun
[May 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c486b40d6&e=1acd9bb3d6): Wayne County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb
[June 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a708679f5&e=1acd9bb3d6): Franklin Township Lincoln Day Dinner

****Have an upcoming Lincoln Day Dinner not listed here? Let us know at [info@indiana.go](mailto:info@indiana.go)[p](mailto:info@indiana.go), and we'll add it on this list! ****

| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[is working to improve schools' career training programs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a715be406c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[welcomes growth of ag company in Hamilton County](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=883bff6136&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Senator Todd Young**[delivered remarks remembering Senator Richard Lugar](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2fee43cf40&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [is working to train more doctors to combat opioid epidemic](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ecd95b0e53&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [is opening a new office in Richmond](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d7b1e875a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

The state is also making it easier for job creators to partner with local schools and prioritizing local solutions to career coaching. Exempting Military Pensions from State Income Tax : Our talented, patriotic veterans are some of the most experienced, focused and loyal workers anywhere, and Indiana is working to attract and retain them as part of Indiana's workforce. Economic Development : Indiana is modernizing economic development tools to increase competitiveness, economic diversity and flexibility. School Safety: This is one of Governor Holcomb's top priorities, and this new law provides access to more funding for safety equipment, facilitates partnerships with local law enforcement and requires threat assessments in our schools. ButGovernor Holcomb's week didn't stop there. Yesterday, he announced that 17 communities will receive $24.9 million in state grants to support trail development as part of Next Level Trails! to see if your community was selected in this first round! | | | Remembering Senator Richard Lugar Reflecting on a Transformative Leader Last Sunday, Indiana and the world lost Richard Lugar: a mayor, senator, visionary, leader and Hoosier. Public memorial services for Senator Lugar are still pending, and we'll update you here when more information is announced. | | | The American Economy is Breaking Records! Thank you, President Trump! The latest national jobs report was released today, and it's BIG news for the U.S. economy! The national unemployment rate has fallen to 3.6%, which is the lowest rate in 50 years! A total of 263,000 new American jobs were added in April, and the average American wage now stands at $27.77/hour! Read more about our record-setting economy . Thank you, President Donald Trump, for your leadership! | | | | | | Lincoln Day Dinners: Southern Indiana & Allen County This was the week for Lincoln Day Dinners in Southern Indiana (plus Allen County)! Over the last week, your local Republican Parties in Perry, Scott, Jackson, Spencer, Orange and Floyd counties hosted fantastic events. And they attracted some big Republican leaders, includingGovernor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Senator Todd Young, Congressman Trey Hollingsworth and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer. And Allen County? They packed the house for Wyoming Congresswoman Liz Cheney , as she talked about her experience as a national security expert and high-ranking member of Congress. Check out the list below to see upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners near you! | | Upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners NOTE: This list is not final and will be updated as additional Lincoln Day Dinners are scheduled throughout Indiana! : Henry County Lincoln Day Dinner with First Lady Janet Holcomb : Whitley County Lincoln Day Dinner with Congressman Jim Banks : Starke County Lincoln Day Dinner with Congresswoman Jackie Walorski : Pulaski County Lincoln Day Dinner with Judge Kocker and Dr. Natalie Federer LaGrange County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb : Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner with Senator Mike Braun : Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner with Senator Mike Braun : Wayne County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Eric Holcomb : Franklin Township Lincoln Day Dinner Have an upcoming Lincoln Day Dinner not listed here? It's because of you that I'll be standing on the debate stage in June.
My team told me this morning that **[our campaign has secured 65,000 unique contributors](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd6e/3eb3e2fc/4d8f3027/7449a4b6/3633209982/VEsF/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com/news-events/we-reached-65000-donors/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+our+campaign+has+secured+65000+unique+co&utm_campaign=20190503_em_gen_65k-reached_all&source=20190503_em_gen_65k-reached_all")** , guaranteeing me a spot in the first round of Democratic National Committee debates in June and July.
When I started this campaign on January 12th, I knew our team would have to work harder with fewer resources.That's something people like you and I have been doing our whole lives, and it doesn't scare me.
That hard work is paying off. Our campaign is getting stronger and stronger every day. More and more people hear about our campaign and get on board. That's because of you, so **let's keep up this momentum!**
See you at the debates!
Thank you,
Julian

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: The people who win or lose...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida, 1427 Piedmont Drive E
body:
Friends,

The reason I ran so unapologetically for Governor was because I was sick and tired of losing -- not for me -- but for the people who lose when we lose elections.

And sadly, now it's clear who is losing after our loss.

Our Florida Legislature, a product of decades of gerrymandering, just passed devastating legislation intended to hurt people, override the will of voters, and leave most behind.

**[That's why I'm asking if you can donate to support our game-changing project to register and re-engage one million Florida voters.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a0/9e00690/6be83c1b/24075de0/2090086676/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwdfla?refcode=050319-es-amd4-session-wrap-fr")**

With the blessing of the Governor, the Florida Legislature just got away with:
* Turning police into ICE decoration agents
* Arming teachers in our schools with guns
* Blocking access to affordable healthcare coverage
* Rolling back Amendment 4 restoration of rights
* Giving away tax breaks to the richest corporations
* Stealing public education money to push into private vouchers

There is simply no way to fix the wrongs passed this year without winning back our State House and State Senate.

Let me be very clear, we cannot allow this to continue. There is only one way to stop it and I am 100 percent committed to the cause and I need you to be, too.

We can fundamentally change the makeup of our elections, which will change the lives of 21 million Floridians. Now we just have to put in the work.

**[Help change our state and country for the better by getting in the game. Help our ground efforts by making a donation today](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a0/9e00690/6be83c1b/24075de0/2090086676/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwdfla?refcode=050319-es-amd4-session-wrap-fr") or [sign up to volunteer.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a0/9e00690/6be83c1b/24075de3/2090086676/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/volunteer-with-forward-florida")**

Think of the people who win when we win.

In solidarity,

Andrew Gillum
[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a0/9e00690/6be83c1b/24075de0/2090086676/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwdfla?refcode=050319-es-amd4-session-wrap-fr")
